title: Day Counter
description: A clean Fabric HUD mod that displays the current Minecraft day.
body:
## 📅 Day Counter

Day Counter is a lightweight Fabric client-side mod that displays the current Minecraft day directly on the HUD.

The mod automatically detects the current game mode (Hardcore, Survival, or Creative) and allows the label to be shown, replaced with custom text, or disabled entirely for a clean, minimal interface.

Designed to be simple and non-intrusive, Day Counter works seamlessly with shaders, resource packs, and custom GUI scales.

### ✨ Features

- Displays the current Minecraft day on the HUD
- Automatic game mode detection (Hardcore / Survival / Creative)
- Label modes: Auto, Custom text, or Off
- Compact, text-wrapping background (optional)
- Adjustable HUD scale 
- In-game configuration menu
- Client-side only (safe to use on servers)

### 🎮 Controls

Open settings menu: K
(Keybind can be changed in Minecraft → Options → Controls)

Note: Some shader mods (e.g. Iris) may use the same default key.
Simply rebind the key if needed.

### 🧩 Installation

- Install Fabric Loader for Minecraft 1.20.1
- Install Fabric API
- Download the Day Counter .jar
- Place the file into your mods folder
- Launch the game using Fabric

### 🔧 Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API (required)
- Compatible with shaders (Iris, Sodium, etc.)
- Compatible with resource packs and custom fonts
